page: Microsoft Azure F64ams_v6 is a memory-intensive server instance belonging to the Famsv6 family, powered by a dedicated AMD EPYC 9V74 processor. Operating on the x86_64 architecture under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this configuration delivers 64 physical cores and 64 vCPUs running at a clock speed of 3.7 GHz. The hardware includes 512.0 GB of system memory, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. While the instance does not feature local storage or bundled GPUs, it is premium storage capable.

Benchmark evaluations indicate top-tier multi-core CPU performance, with stress-ng multi-core and Passmark CPU scores ranking in the top 10% of tested systems. Memory performance is highly competitive, featuring top-tier read-only small block cached bandwidth of 9386.02 GB/sec and strong uncached large block read and write speeds. The system also demonstrates top-tier capabilities in multi-threaded bzip3 decompression, software compilation with clang, and ray tracing. For database and memory-bound operations, the server achieved top-tier performance in Redis SET operations, processing 135.23 million operations per second.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the F64ams_v6 offers high resource density, balancing a massive memory footprint with strong compute capabilities without the added expense of integrated GPUs or local storage. This makes it a highly efficient choice for memory-intensive workloads that rely on external premium storage. The instance is well-suited for large-scale database operations, high-throughput web serving, software compilation, and medium-scale language model inference tasks.
description: Microsoft Azure F64ams_v6 is a memory-intensive virtual machine from the Famsv6 family, powered by a dedicated 64-core AMD EPYC 9V74 processor running at 3.7 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. It features 512.0 GB of RAM, yielding a high ratio of 8.0 GB of memory per core, and operates under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. While it lacks local storage and integrated GPUs, it is premium storage capable. Benchmark data shows top-tier multi-core CPU performance, exceptional memory bandwidth, and outstanding database execution, highlighted by 135.23 million operations per second in Redis SET tests. This server is highly cost-efficient for memory-bound workloads requiring substantial compute power, making it ideal for large databases, multi-threaded software compilation, and high-throughput web serving.
og_description: Microsoft Azure F64ams_v6 is a memory-intensive virtual server featuring a 64-core AMD EPYC 9V74 processor, 512 GB of RAM, and top-tier multi-core and database benchmark performance.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure F64ams_v6 is a memory-intensive virtual server with 64 AMD EPYC cores, 512 GB RAM, and top-tier multi-core performance.
tagline: A memory-intensive virtual server featuring sixty-four dedicated AMD EPYC cores and half a terabyte of RAM for demanding database workloads.
bullet_points: Dedicated AMD EPYC 9V74 processor with 64 physical cores running at 3.7 GHz
512.0 GB of system memory providing a high 8.0 GB per core ratio
Top-tier multi-core CPU performance and memory bandwidth benchmarks
Optimized for memory-intensive workloads, large databases, and software compilation
Premium storage capable configuration without local storage or integrated GPUs
